title: Bridge Triage Trajectory Entry
description: Schema for trajectory log entries emitted by post-pr-triage.sh when classifying and acting on Bridgebuilder findings. Mandatory reasoning field per HITL design decision #1 — autonomous mode may act on findings only when reasoning is logged.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the triage decision was made

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number the finding was raised against

finding_id.description: Finding identifier from the Bridgebuilder review (e.g., "high-1", "critical-2")

action.description: Action taken by the triage: dispatch_bug (BLOCKER auto-dispatch), log_only (HIGH+ in autonomous mode), lore_candidate (PRAISE → mining queue), defer (manual HITL review), skip_false_positive (heuristic filter)

reasoning.description: Explicit reasoning for the action taken. Required by HITL design decision #1 — autonomous mode MUST log reasoning so humans can audit decisions post-hoc.

auto_dispatched_bug_id.description: Bug ID created via auto-dispatch (only present when action=dispatch_bug succeeded). Format: YYYYMMDD-<slug>, where slug is lowercase alphanumeric with optional hyphens (e.g., '20260413-autobridge-critical-1').

review_file.description: Path to the source findings file (e.g., .run/bridge-reviews/bridge-XXXX-iter1-findings.json)
